cost_estimate.notes: Teachable Builder $828/yr (paid). ElevenLabs $22/mo. AI build costs ~$300–500. Most cost already incurred. Revenue target: $249 early bird → $399 standard.
10 of 25 AI videos built. 15 blocked until Apr 24. On-camera modules (1, 6.3, 7.3, 7.4, 8) recorded by Pol post-travel. Pricing: $399 EB / $499 std / $749–899 cohort / $3,500/yr institutional.
One-pager + Calendly already live ($0). Outreach is time only. Revenue target: $3,000–10,000 per engagement. Highest ROI of any phase.
25 questions structured. Validate demand with course audience first. AI-assisted custom web app (Tier 2): $500–2,000 + 40–80 hrs. Stripe + auth + Supabase backend.

cost_estimate.recommended_tier: Manual consulting first, then AI-assisted SaaS
cost_estimate.notes: Do NOT build until 3 consulting clients validate the framework. Revenue potential: $200–500/mo per institution × 20 = $4,000–10,000/mo. Concept validated Apr 5 2026.
Book Writing Agent live Sundays 7 PM. Dev editor: $2,000–5,000. Copy editor: $1,000–3,000. Cover + formatting: $500–2,000. Traditional publishing: free to query but 12–24 months longer.

bold_recommendation: Mitesh Patel calls tomorrow at 7:30 PM ET. This is your first real consulting conversation with a prospect whose admin is already asking for APP efficiency KPIs and STS attribution. Let him set the scene for the first 5 minutes — don't pitch, don't over-explain. Walk through the 4-category framework. The case seed at consulting/case-seeds/mitesh-patel.md must contain his verbatim pain language — that language becomes your next offer page, your next LinkedIn post, your next sales script. One good call doesn't close a deal. One good call with rigorous documentation compounds forever.
bold_recommendation_impact: 💰 Gate: (1) Call executed · (2) Case seed filed with verbatim language · (3) Artifact passes decision-impact check A/B/C · (4) Buyer-visible integration on one surface · (5) Enforcer evaluates Apr 15
